titleStmt.title: SII 5.665: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 665. (A.R. No. 104 of 1895). IN THE SAME PLACE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī .In the first few lines the engraver has misplaced some words and has not engraved some.tiru manṉi vaḷara ceyappāvai Irunila maṭant Aiyum cartanalRead cirttani.ce
lviyum tan perun=ta viyum pārticai yanpuṟa neṭuntuyil Ūḻiyuḷ
p paṭar vanavāciyumc cuḷḷacRead cuḷḷīc.cūḻ matiṭ koḷḷippākraiyumRead pākkaiyam.naṇṇaṟkaru
muraṇ maṇṇaikkaṭakkamum porukaṭal līḻat taraicarta muṭiyum ĀṅkavaṉRead ṟeviya.piṟavi
roṅkeḻil muṭiyum munṉavan pakkal tenṉavan vaitta cun=ta ramuṭiyum caRead i.
n=ti ra nāra(m)mum teṇṭirai Īḻamaṇṭala muḻutum Eṟipaṭaik keraḷan muṟaimayiṟ
c cūṭum kulatanamākiya palar pukaḻ muṭiyum ceṅkatir mālaiy caṅkatirvelai to
l peruṅkāvil pala paḻan(ta)tivum ceruviṟ cinaviṟ Irupattorukāl AracukaḷaiRead kaṭṭa.kaṇṭa para
cirāman mepperuñ cān=ti maṟṟivararaicar karuti Iruttiya cempon tiruttaku muṭiyum
māpperu n=ta ṇṭāl koṇṭa kopparakecaripaṟmarāna śrīrājentra coḻatevaṟkku yāṇ
ṭu Eṭṭāvatu Uttoṅkatoṅkavaḷanāṭākiya kunṟakkūṟṟattu brahma teyam ciṟupaḻuvū
r sabhai yom Innāṭṭu mannu perumpaḻuvūr Aṭikaḷ paḻuveṭṭaraiyar peṇṭāṭ
ṭi virāṇan Oṟṟiyūr Eṅkaḷūrt tiruvālan tuṟai ma hāde vaṟku cittirai viṣu vukkum Appicai viṣu vuk
kum Uttirayanattukkum dekṣa ṇayaṉattukkum tirumañcaṉa māṭiaruḷi perun=ti ruvamutu nāṟ
ṟūṇi Aricikku nellu mukkalane tūṇiyum nīṟ nel nāṟkalane patakkum koṇṭu tiruma
ñcaṉam ceyivikkak kaṭavomāka koṇṭa kācu A(ñ)mpatu Ikkā cañpatum koṇṭu kaṭa
vom koṇṭa paricāvatu Ikkācu 5 10- kkum Āṭaṭaivaṭṭan palicai kiran Ilakkuvaṇan marakkā
lāl nellu muppatin kalam Innel muppatin kalattālum cittirai
viṣu vum Appicai viṣu vum Uttaraāyaṉamum dekṣa ṇaāyanamum nālu tirumañcana
mum nālu perun=ti ruvamutum Ākat tirumañcaṉan toṟum nāṟṟūṇi Ariciyāl
van=ta nel mukkalane tūṇiyum nīkki nel nāṟkkalane patakkāl tirumañcanañ ceyi
vikkak kaṭavomākavum Ikkācu 5 10 koṇṭu nel muppatin kalamum Aḷakka kaṭavo
mākavum Ipparicu Ikkācu koṇṭu ciṟupaḻuvūr cavaiyom Ittevarkku yāṇṭu
Āvatu tiruvālan tuṟai ma hātevar Iṟai nilattāl nel muppatin kalamum
vopāti tevarkaṉaik kāṭṭapeṟātomānom sabhai yom Itu panmā heśvara
rakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 5.665 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Renato Dávalos.
